case_title: JANET WHITE VS. SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT SFHA HOUSING CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-03-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
